paper.title_en: A nonstandard statistics for strongly correlated systems: Two simple examples
paper.abstract_en: We discuss two different cases of strongly correlated fermions statistics. The first of them is the non-Fermi liquid (NFL) case, $i.e.$, that of fermions with exclusion of doubly occupancy of quasimomentum states $\{\bf k\}$ with opposite spins ($\uparrow\downarrow$). The second is that of statistical spin liquid (SSL) case, in which the fermion spins hop around and mix with the holes (unoccupied) states. For both cases we calculate the system entropy and the corresponding statistical distribution function, analyzed for a two-dimensional square-lattice filling $n\in [0,1]$ and relative temperature $k_B T/|t|$, where $t<0$ is the nearest neighbor hopping integral. We are particularly interested in the situation when the system of itinerant fermions reduce to the Mott-insulator state for the half-filled band ($n\to1$). This limiting situation signals a qualitative difference between the present SSL statistics and that of uncorrelated fermions representing normal Fermi-liquid state.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文研究了强关联费米子系统的非标准统计，涉及非费米液体和统计自旋液体，与凝聚态物理中的强关联系统相关，属于全息凝聚态兴趣范畴。
decision.title_zh: 强关联系统的非标准统计：两个简单例子
decision.abstract_zh: 我们讨论了强关联费米子统计的两种不同情况。第一种是非费米液体情况，即具有相反自旋（↑↓）的准动量态 {k} 双重占据被排除的费米子。第二种是统计自旋液体情况，其中费米子自旋跳跃并与空穴（未占据）态混合。对于这两种情况，我们计算了系统的熵和相应的统计分布函数，并针对二维方格填充 n∈[0,1] 和相对温度 k_B T/|t| 进行了分析，其中 t<0 是最近邻跳跃积分。我们特别感兴趣的是，当巡回费米子系统在半填充带（n→1）时简化为莫特绝缘体态的情况。这种极限情况标志着当前的统计自旋液体统计与代表正常费米液体态的无关联费米子统计之间的定性差异。
